name: Misono "  that wall" Mika
description:
Misono mika, the Protostar of Trinity. Our sweet angel who did NOTHING WRONG. The sweetie is such an Innocent princess who cant possible hurt a fly (nevermind the fact she can and has crashed through walls multiple times) She loves Sensei and can be a bit naive, but who cares, she is cute

Dead dove warning for her plethora of mental issues and irrational hatred for Gehenna and gehenners

Artist is matchamassa
creator: 250deadrats
